[Class Bonus] **On Enter:** Another target ally you control becomes **distant**.

effect:
**Pride 3**

[Class Bonus] At the beginning of your recollection phase, **summon** a copy of CARDNAME rested. *(Counters on this ally are not copied.)*
effect_raw:
Pride 3

[Class Bonus] At the beginning of your recollection phase, summon a copy of Convoking Slime rested. (Counters on this ally are not copied.)
flavor: As a new sun rises, so does a new slime.
name: Convoking Slime

rule.description: The summoned Convoking Slimes do not copy any additional attributes such as buff counters or modified stats.

effect_html: Pride 3Class Bonus At the beginning of your recollection phase, summon a copy of Convoking Slime rested. (Counters on this ally are not copied.)

effect: Return target regalia to its owner's material deck.
effect_raw: Return target regalia to its owner's material deck.
flavor:
Things worn and torn need not be spurned
to ash and dust. They'll be returned
with new life and purpose earned.
name: Dematerialize
effect_html: Return target regalia to its owner's material deck.

effect:
**On Enter:** Draw a card into your memory.

**Sacrifice an Automaton ally and a Human ally:** Put the top two cards of your deck into your graveyard.
effect_raw:
On Enter: Draw a card into your memory.

Sacrifice an Automaton ally and a Human ally: Put the top two cards of your deck into your graveyard.
flavor: The mythological resting place of a voracious titan.
name: Dormant Sacrificial Altar
effect_html: On Enter: Draw a card into your memory.Sacrifice an Automaton ally and a Human ally: Put the top two cards of your deck into your graveyard.

effect:
**Imbue 2** *(You may reserve all cards revealed as you activate this card. If at least two of them are wind element, this card becomes **imbued**.)*

As long as CARDNAME is **imbued**, cards can’t leave your opponents’ material decks unless it’s their materialize phase.
effect_raw:
Imbue 2 (You may reserve all cards revealed as you activate this card. If at least two of them are wind element, this card becomes imbued.)

As long as Eternal Magistrate is imbued, cards can’t leave your opponents’ material decks unless it’s their materialize phase.
name: Eternal Magistrate

rule.description: Eternal Magistrate cannot prevent special game actions (e.g., preventing players from putting a LV 0 spirit onto the field).
You reserve the cards face up. You do not place them face down and then 'reveal' them.

effect_html: Imbue 2 (You may reserve all cards revealed as you activate this card. If at least two of them are wind element, this card becomes imbued.)As long as Eternal Magistrate is imbued, cards can’t leave your opponents’ material decks unless it’s their materialize phase.

**Floating Memory**

The target item or weapon loses all of its original types and subtypes.

effect:
[Class Bonus] **On Attack:** You may banish a fire element card from your graveyard. If you do, deal 1 damage to each other unit. 

[Level 3+] [Memory 4+] CARDNAME gets +2 [POWER].

[Class Bonus] On Attack: You may banish a fire element card from your graveyard. If you do, deal 1 damage to each other unit. 

[Level 3+] [Memory 4+] Inzali gets +2 POWER.
flavor: Free from eternal servitude, free to endlessly smite.
name: Inzali, Unshackled Blaze
effect_html: Class Bonus On Attack: You may banish a fire element card from your graveyard. If you do, deal 1 damage to each other unit. Level 3+ Memory 4+ Inzali gets +2.

effect: Whenever your champion levels up, you may put two cards from your hand and/or memory on the bottom of your deck. If you do, draw two cards.
effect_raw: Whenever your champion levels up, you may put two cards from your hand and/or memory on the bottom of your deck. If you do, draw two cards.
flavor: The sanctum sanctorum of an imperial alchemist. Incredible and horrific secrets can be found within.
name: Sanctum of Esoteric Truth
effect_html: Whenever your champion levels up, you may put two cards from your hand and/or memory on the bottom of your deck. If you do, draw two cards.

effect: Look at the top four cards of your deck and put them back in any order. Draw a card.
effect_raw: Look at the top four cards of your deck and put them back in any order. Draw a card.
flavor:
“The politics and kingmaking of empires matter little to me as long as there’s a bounty to be found.”
— Perse, Relentless Raptor
name: Scout the Land
effect_html: Look at the top four cards of your deck and put them back in any order. Draw a card.

effect:

editions.flavor: Restless souls roam mortal soil, let the Shenju's breath cease their toil.

editions.flavor: Rambunctious critters that hold Gaia's favor. They often charm and delight many a traveler.

"Hello, friends! Wow, there are so many of you! 
Are you here to play too?"

flavor: Playful, curious, and above all, adorable. Even a simple encounter makes travellers light of heart.
name: Woodland Squirrels

result_editions.flavor:
"Hello, friends! Wow, there are so many of you! 
Are you here to play too?"
